subcodes.first_line: In truth, it hath never been, nor shall it ever be, befitting to offer praise and make mention of the True One—exalted be His glory and bountiful His favors—for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فی الحقیقه حق جل جلاله و عم نواله را ثنا و ذکر گفتن لایق نبوده و نیست چه که
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
